{"type":"freeform","cover":{"titleText":"","titleTextRelFontSize":10,"subTitleText":"","subTitleTextRelFontSize":6,"presenterText":"","presenterTextRelFontSize":4,"dateText":"","dateTextRelFontSize":3,"logos":[]},"section":{"sectionText":"","sectionTextRelFontSize":8,"smallerSectionText":"","smallerSectionTextRelFontSize":5},"freeform":{"content":[[{"type":"text","stretch":true,"fillArea":true,"textSize":1,"textBackground":"success","placeholderInvisible":false,"placeholderStretch":true,"placeholderHeight":50,"useFigureAdditionalScale":false,"figureAdditionalScale":1,"imgHeight":300,"imgFit":"inside","imgStretch":true,"hideFigureCaption":false,"hideFigureSubCaption":false,"hideFigureFootnote":false,"markdown":"Overview of the Data Quality Performance Assessment Methodology
Identifies key data quality issues by assessing indicator completeness, detecting extreme outliers, and evaluating consistency between related indicators — using monthly, facility-level HMIS data.
Applies targeted adjustments to flagged data points by replacing outliers and imputing missing values using a centered 12-month rolling average; fallback facility-level averages are used when insufficient history exists.
Enables sensitivity analysis by producing results under four scenarios (no adjustment, outlier-only, completeness-only, and combined), with certain indicators that don't meet inclusion criteria excluded from adjustment. For this analysis, adjustment is for [OUTLIERS ONLY].
Overview of the Service Utilization Performance Assessment Methodology
Service utilization trend analysis, which identifies the percentage change in service use for each quarter of data compared to the previous quarter.
Disruptions and surplus in service delivery utilization analysis, which helps to identify meaningful positive or negative changes in service use outside of what we would expect given seasonal trends and historical trends and the optimal denominator is selected by minimizing the error relative to the most recent survey data.","span":8},{"type":"text","markdown":"More details on the methodology and data quality adjustment approaches are found in the Annex. 

All R code and source documentation is also publicly available on GitHub 

(https://github.com/clairecda/FASTR_R_codes/tree/main).","stretch":true,"fillArea":false,"textSize":0.8,"textBackground":"danger","placeholderInvisible":false,"placeholderStretch":true,"placeholderHeight":50,"useFigureAdditionalScale":false,"figureAdditionalScale":1,"imgHeight":300,"imgFit":"inside","imgStretch":true,"hideFigureCaption":false,"hideFigureSubCaption":false,"hideFigureFootnote":false}]],"useHeader":true,"headerText":"Methodology
","useFooter":true}}

{"type":"freeform","cover":{"titleText":"","titleTextRelFontSize":10,"subTitleText":"","subTitleTextRelFontSize":6,"presenterText":"","presenterTextRelFontSize":4,"dateText":"","dateTextRelFontSize":3,"logos":[]},"section":{"sectionText":"","sectionTextRelFontSize":8,"smallerSectionText":"","smallerSectionTextRelFontSize":5},"freeform":{"content":[[{"type":"text","stretch":true,"fillArea":true,"textSize":1,"textBackground":"primary","placeholderInvisible":false,"placeholderStretch":true,"placeholderHeight":50,"useFigureAdditionalScale":false,"figureAdditionalScale":1,"imgHeight":300,"imgFit":"inside","imgStretch":true,"hideFigureCaption":false,"hideFigureSubCaption":false,"hideFigureFootnote":false,"markdown":"
# Key Findings:

- ANC1 vs ANC4 consistency is strong in most regions (≥90% for almost all; only Central Ethiopia at 87.1% and Harari at 81.0% are lower).

- Delivery vs BCG is the main problem: most regions are <80%, with extreme lows (Afar 0.0%, Harari 4.8%, Somali 7.7%, Benishangul 20.0%)

- Best overall performer: Sidama (ANC1>ANC4 94.3%, Delivery≈BCG 97.1%, Penta1>Penta3 100%).

{"type":"freeform","cover":{"titleText":"","titleTextRelFontSize":10,"subTitleText":"","subTitleTextRelFontSize":6,"presenterText":"","presenterTextRelFontSize":4,"dateText":"","dateTextRelFontSize":3,"logos":[]},"section":{"sectionText":"","sectionTextRelFontSize":8,"smallerSectionText":"","smallerSectionTextRelFontSize":5},"freeform":{"content":[[{"type":"text","stretch":true,"fillArea":true,"textSize":1,"textBackground":"primary","placeholderInvisible":false,"placeholderStretch":true,"placeholderHeight":50,"useFigureAdditionalScale":false,"figureAdditionalScale":1,"imgHeight":300,"imgFit":"inside","imgStretch":true,"hideFigureCaption":false,"hideFigureSubCaption":false,"hideFigureFootnote":false,"span":4,"markdown":"# Key Findings
